title: Visual-fidelity v0 + texture registry integration

stories.title: **ASSET-textures-via-registry** ‚úÖ ‚Äî texture refs route through `AssetRegistry.get<Texture>()`.
stories.summary: New `engine/render/texture-loader.ts` registered with material + glb loaders. `MaterialPatch.{map,normalMap,bumpMap,roughnessMap,metalnessMap,emissiveMap,aoMap}` typed as pre-loaded `Texture` instances. Adapter retired its local `textureCache` + `acquireTexture`. 404s now emit `AGF_RUNTIME_ASSET_LOAD_FAILED`.
verification: legacy import ‚Äî see sprint notes[] for the original sprint-level verification

stories.title: **GROUND-skybox** ‚úÖ ‚Äî `three/addons/objects/GroundedSkybox.js` vendored.
stories.summary: `scene.environment.groundedSkybox: { height, radius }` mounts a curved-bottom sky mesh + an invisible `ShadowMaterial` shadow-catcher at the same height (lifted 1mm, renderOrder=1) so shadows fall on the virtual ground.
verification: legacy import ‚Äî see sprint notes[] for the original sprint-level verification

stories.title: **REFLECTION-cube-probe** ‚úÖ ‚Äî new `ReflectionProbe` + `EnvmapBinding` scene components, adapter API for `CubeCamera + WebGLCubeRenderTarget`‚Ä¶
stories.summary: **REFLECTION-cube-probe** ‚úÖ ‚Äî new `ReflectionProbe` + `EnvmapBinding` scene components, adapter API for `CubeCamera + WebGLCubeRenderTarget` lifecycle, new `ReflectionProbeSystem` that gates rendering by `updateRate` (0/15/30/60 Hz), hides `excludeEntities` + the owner, and stamps the resulting cube texture onto every entity with `EnvmapBinding`.
verification: legacy import ‚Äî see sprint notes[] for the original sprint-level verification

verification: legacy import ‚Äî see sprint notes[] for the original sprint-level verification

stories.title: **POST-color-lut** ‚úÖ ‚Äî `LUTPass` + `LUTCubeLoader` vendored.
stories.summary: `project.render.post: [{ kind: "color-lut", file, intensity? }]`. LUT URL resolution rides through `adapter.lutUrlResolver` (default routes via `AssetRegistry.urlFor`).
verification: legacy import ‚Äî see sprint notes[] for the original sprint-level verification

stories.summary: **PERFTEST-material-bench-budget** ‚úÖ ‚Äî soft / hard ceilings rebaked for the new scene shape (geometries 6‚Üí10 / textures 24‚Üí36 / programs 16‚Üí20 / meshes 32‚Üí48 soft; hard up proportionally). Three vendor bundle budget 300 ‚Üí 320 KB after the new addons.

stories.summary: **DOCS-vfx-skill** ‚úÖ ‚Äî new `docs/agent/skills/vfx-authoring.md` covering every VFX surface AGF ships today + a perf-gotcha section + the material-bench worked example.

stories.title: **MATERIAL-bench-vfx-adopt** ‚úÖ ‚Äî dark plinth removed; GroundedSkybox at y=-0.75 r=60; 8 cylindrical "stonehenge" stone columns at radius 11‚Ä¶
stories.summary: **MATERIAL-bench-vfx-adopt** ‚úÖ ‚Äî dark plinth removed; GroundedSkybox at y=-0.75 r=60; 8 cylindrical "stonehenge" stone columns at radius 11 (new `stone.material.json`); centre chrome sphere hosts `ReflectionProbe` 256¬≤ @ 60 Hz + `EnvmapBinding` self-ref; shadow-camera frustum widened to ¬±14 / far 40.
verification: legacy import ‚Äî see sprint notes[] for the original sprint-level verification

stories.title: **DOCTOR-reflection-section** ‚úÖ ‚Äî `engine doctor` `Reflections:` section enumerates declared probes (size, cadence, exclude count),‚Ä¶
stories.summary: **DOCTOR-reflection-section** ‚úÖ ‚Äî `engine doctor` `Reflections:` section enumerates declared probes (size, cadence, exclude count), estimates extra renders/sec, warns about probes without self-exclude and bindings with unknown probe ids. Static-only; bootstrap-spawned probes (material-bench's) don't show up by design.
verification: legacy import ‚Äî see sprint notes[] for the original sprint-level verification

followUps: **REFLECTION-prefilter (S58 Story 1)** ‚Äî full GGX prefilter through `PMREMGenerator.fromCubemap` at 10 Hz; required for `roughness > 0.3` reflective materials to read plausibly blurry environment.
**REFLECTION-planar (parking lot)** ‚Äî vendored `Reflector.js` for water / lobby-floor surfaces.

**DOCTOR-reflection scans bootstrap entities** ‚Äî today the doctor only scans scene JSON; material-bench's probe is invisible to it. Adding a runtime probe inventory via the dev bridge would close that gap.
**`engine doctor` Reflections cost estimate** is naive (probes √ó 6 √ó updateRate). A real perf-probe would account for view-frustum culling and the actual scene draw cost per cube face.
notes: Deliverables: `engine/render/texture-loader.ts` (new) ‚Äî `AssetLoader<Texture>` registered in `src/app.ts`.; `engine/render/systems/reflection-probe-system.ts` (new).; `engine/render/three-render-adapter.ts` ‚Äî texture-bind retire, post-pass union extended (SSAO / LUT), GroundedSkybox + shadow-catcher mount, reflection-probe API (acquire / setTransform / update / texture / release / meshForHandle), envMap MaterialPatch fields, NoColorSpace re-tagging.; `engine/runtime/start.ts` ‚Äî `groundedSkybox` plumbed through HDR + cube env paths, reflection-probe system registered.; `engine/core/ecs/types.ts` ‚Äî `SceneEnvironmentInput.{groundedSkybox}`.; `schemas/components/render.schema.json` ‚Äî `reflectionProbeComponent` + `envmapBindingComponent` defs.; `schemas/scene.schema.json` ‚Äî `ReflectionProbe` + `EnvmapBinding` registered + `environment.groundedSkybox`.; `schemas/project.schema.json` ‚Äî `render.post` enum + `ProjectMeta.render.post`.; `examples/material-bench/` ‚Äî stonehenge in `bootstrap.ts`, `stone.material.json`, scene shadow camera widened, dark plinth removed, GroundedSkybox env, performance budget rebaked.; `docs/agent/skills/vfx-authoring.md` (new).; `docs/adr/0012-asset-registry-texture-resolution.md` ‚Äî "full integration shipped" record.; `scripts/check-bundle-size.mjs` ‚Äî three-vendor budget 300 ‚Üí 320 KB.

Verification: `npm run preflight` ‚úÖ at sprint close ‚Äî repo:hygiene + 5 engine:check projects + imports:check + systems:check + typecheck + 83 unit test files / 505 tests + build + bundle:check + 11/11 e2e smoke (33.3 s).; User live-verified: HDR sky meets cement pedestals; centre chrome reflects orbiting ring + stonehenge.

Deferred to Sprint 58: 6 `REFLECTION-prefilter` ‚Äî three.js's automatic cubemap mipmap chain is close enough for the chrome-roughness 0.18 case; full GGX prefilter via `PMREMGenerator.fromCubemap` lands when a `roughness > 0.3` reflective material asks for it.
